baseline_cost_discrepancy.resolution: Used the named authoritative ZIP member and the official local profiling scorer.

051.true_rule: Extend the rare beam color through the narrow side of the triangular laser to the boundary, after accounting for rotation.
051.rule_verification: validate 4/4; fresh 5000/5000 for each seed 80051620 and 80061620

064.true_rule: Fill straight projections from aligned sparse dots to the solid rectangle; leave diagonal dots unchanged.
064.rule_verification: validate 5/5; fresh 5000/5000 for each seed 80051620 and 80061620

185.true_rule: Recover the 3x3 colored pattern from colored intersections in the line grid.
185.rule_verification: validate 5/5; fresh 5000/5000 for each seed 80051620 and 80061620

200.true_rule: From the bottom marker, draw alternating full-height color stripes and gray turn endpoints.
200.rule_verification: validate 4/4; fresh 5000/5000 for each seed 80051620 and 80061620

245.true_rule: Translate the red 5x5 sprite into the green-corner 7x7 frame.
245.rule_verification: validate 5/5, including diagonal displacement; fresh 5000/5000 for each seed 80051620 and 80061620

264.true_rule: Identify the nine gray 3x3 digit glyphs and reassemble their colored marks in digit slots of a 9x9 grid.
264.rule_verification: validate 3/3; 5000/5000 for each seed 80051620 and 80061620 using generator-legal constructive nonoverlap layouts

394.true_rule: Recover the black square bite from the periodic pattern using the same-residue row one period away.
394.rule_verification: validate 4/4; fresh 5000/5000 for each seed 80051620 and 80061620

397.true_rule: Give each 2x2 box a green shadow whose height equals its number of distinct colors.
397.rule_verification: validate 4/4; fresh 5000/5000 for each seed 80051620 and 80061620

candidate_rejections.reason: Invalid latent-axis permutation; ScatterElements updates only basis row 0.
It computes the ARC argmax picture but leaves required background one-hot entries at zero, so the official >0 mask is wrong.
Conv has 2 output channels and bias length 1; UB-dependent and separately observed at only 4999/5000 fresh.
Conv has 2 output channels and bias length 1; UB-dependent.

history_summary.185: excluded by the historical private/history-black catalog; only a decoded true-rule rebuild could qualify
history_summary.200: older static floor 623 plus unsafe/wrong 344-345 experiments
history_summary.245: four distinct models; best static floor 406 versus authoritative current 387
history_summary.264: six models; best non-giant floor 461, one 17-input giant Einsum, and a separate nominal 358 model failed runtime
history_summary.394: floor-189 model measured 351; floor-519 model rejected; old 342/348 experiments were known-wrong
history_summary.397: floor 269/283/285/298 models measured 395/407/409/368; safe older floor 2752
